overrides.author: Maciej
overrides.text:
From Maciej: • <@U06CCFTNBS6>, after your meeting with ByLight let's update the due dates in Asana to realistic numbers and let them know.
• <@U058LGYMEQ0>, did you need support on S0-VTOL stuff? Looks like some deadlines this week that I assume <@U01511MEQ90> or <@U06NQAYBLRK> can help with depending on their workload.
• <@U07FN4QSNDN> or <@U01511MEQ90>, you had both mentioned using our AI tools to start on those NASA RFI's, are one of you able to get going on that soon? Otherwise I can take a
